title: Poker Face
why_this_song: Poker Face by Lady Gaga (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 30 times; first heard in: "Can't read my, can't read my"

Appears 30 times; first heard in: "No, he can't read my poker face"

Appears 11 times; first heard in: "(She's got me like nobody)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "read" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "read" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Lady Gaga one question about "Poker Face", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Lady Gaga sobre "Poker Face", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Poker Face" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Poker Face" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Poker Face" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Poker Face" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
